summaryForNext: Phase closed: 4/4 goals MET (G1 governance-lint + G4 lifetime-agent-budget-refusal in one change; G2 local-exchange metric + strict cross-replica rate-limit mode; G3 agent_tool_policies Cedar sugar — admin-UI sub-scope explicitly deferred). 3/3 changes archived, 100% first-pass QA, zero constraint violations, zero new deps. Two LOW security-review findings (both in this session's own code) fixed pre-archive; recurring pattern = a fail-safe seam left ADVISORY where it should REFUSE, caught only by the separated reviewer, both corrected to refuse-start. Sycophancy gate: 0.0, no S-08. Two structural debts deferred by design, both about COMPLETENESS: (1) governance lint walks YAML routes only — DB-sourced/hot-reload routes unlinted (reusable agent_governance_lint_routes helper already exists); (2) config agent_tool_policies enforced only in no-DB deployments — refuses-start with a DB instead of merging. Recommended next phase 'agent-governance-completeness-and-policy-authoring': (1) lint+govern DB routes on the merged set HIGH; (2) merge config sugar into the DB-backed engine + lift the refuse-start guard HIGH; (3) admin-UI policy builder MEDIUM. Still authorization-first; federate any JWKS IdM (Ory reference), never an IdP; LLM-ops bundle out of scope.
